summary: Remindly first-pass both (backend + frontend) testing. 17/17 backend pytest tests pass (100%). All critical frontend flows verified end-to-end on mobile viewport 390x844: splash→login redirect, signup (new user lands on dashboard), reminder wizard (4 steps), reminder creation with success modal, back-to-dashboard showing new reminder, reminder detail with Complete/Postpone/Cancel actions (postpone +30min works, complete returns to dashboard), contacts CRUD, profile view and sign-out, SMS tile visible for +91. Near-future firing verified (triggered_count 0→1 and status pending→completed within ~20s). Ownership enforcement verified (cross-user 404). Integrations mock paths confirmed from backend logs: [email MOCK], [sms MOCK], [whatsapp MOCK]; expo push does a real POST to exp.host and returns 200 even with fake token.

issues: Non-blocking deprecation warnings logged at runtime: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents), Image style.resizeMode deprecated. Should be cleaned up in UI primitives.

Expo package version mismatches logged by Metro: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage, @react-native-community/datetimepicker, expo-device, expo-notifications, expo-secure-store versions differ from expected for current expo SDK. May cause native issues on device.

action_items: Optional: review_request spec says signup full name testID is 'signup-fullname', but actual is 'signup-name'. Align either the spec or the testID so docs/tests stay in sync.
Optional: suppress/fix the deprecation warnings (shadow*, pointerEvents, Image.style.resizeMode) in src/ui.tsx components.
Optional: align package versions with Expo SDK suggestions (expo-notifications, async-storage, datetimepicker, expo-device, expo-secure-store) for native builds.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 692 lines — still manageable but close to the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routes/senders/scheduling modules as it grows.
All HTTPX/Mongo operations are async and non-blocking; ObjectId is correctly excluded via projections ({"_id": 0}).
JWT secret comes from env; CORS is open '*' — acceptable for preview; tighten in production.
All interactive elements have testID. Text is wrapped in Text components. Styles use StyleSheet.create (verified by grep on key files).
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates TEST_ prefixed users/reminders/contacts per run; UI test creates transient users test_ui_*@example.com and test_detail_*@example.com. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://remind-everywhere.preview.emergentagent.com. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_remindly_api.py — includes near-future firing test that waits ~20s. Key frontend testIDs: login-email/password/submit, signup-name/email/phone/password/submit, fab-create-reminder, wizard-title/message/next/submit/back, ch-push/whatsapp/email/sms, target-self/other, pick-contact-<id>, target-name/phone/email, save-person-toggle, reminder-card-<id>, action-complete/postpone/cancel, detail-delete, send-<channel>, add-contact-btn, contact-name/phone/email/save, logout-btn. Integrations (twilio/resend) are mocked — logs '[email MOCK] / [sms MOCK] / [whatsapp MOCK]' confirm firing path runs end-to-end.
rca_of_issue: No blocking issues. Minor: initial pytest run had 2 self-inflicted failures (test used TEST_ upper-case prefix in email; backend correctly lowercases on signup/login). Fix was on the test side only; re-run showed 17/17 green. No app-side bug.
